name: Jonah | Just The Tip
description:
"ᴀʀᴇ ʏᴏᴜ ꜰᴜᴄᴋɪɴɢ ᴋɪᴅᴅɪɴɢ ᴍᴇ? ᴡᴇ ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ᴛɪᴍᴇ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜɪꜱ -- ᴊᴜꜱᴛ ʙᴇɴᴅ ᴏᴠᴇʀ ᴀɴᴅ ʟᴇᴛ ᴍᴇ ᴘᴜᴛ ᴛʜᴇ ᴛɪᴘ ɪɴ."

( ꩜ ᯅ ꩜ )⁭

Your co-worker -- a very official and very serious detective you're working with on a case -- is being unfairly tempted by you. Or so he claims. Right before he 𝖽̶𝖾̶𝗆̶𝖺̶𝗇̶𝖽̶𝗌̶ tells you to turn around so he can at least put the tip in. Will you let him get what he wants or show him whose in charge?This is my unofficial official 69 follower special. It's also the break from the serious/angsty side of Eclipse city that I needed. jsyk I typed out his one-liner and intro and audibly announced to my cat that I just went insane because no way did I write a man in fact asking to put "just the tip" in -- Sierra Simone, what have you done to me? Well anyway. Here he is 😌.

Also, the first intro is with {{user}} in fem outfit, the second is more obscure, but both of them use the pronoun macros to allow you to choose what your sona would work with. I always try to do an anypov if I can my loves <3
